untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) gap at end of trend, (2) prior continuation gap in same trend, (3) trend reversal confirmation, (4) price consolidation region. These require multi-bar trend analysis, gap detection logic, and consolidation pattern recognition not available in the allowed indicator set. No single indicator directly identifies exhaustion gaps or consolidation regions.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using high volume + wide range + price reversal as proxies for exhaustion gap characteristics. However, true exhaustion gap detection requires: identifying prior trend direction and length, detecting gap opening/closing (requires intraday or gap comparisons beyond prev_close), confirming at least 2 gaps in sequence, and validating consolidation pattern post-gap. The pattern is fundamentally structural and temporal, not reducible to simple technical indicator thresholds.
